IDENTIFIER_TAGS.errorMax: You may only attach at most {max} identifiers to the "{name}" field.
IDENTIFIER_TAGS.errorRequireType: Identifier must be in the form "type:identifier".
IDENTIFIER_TAGS.errorTypedNotAllowed: Typed identifiers are not allowed for this field.
IDENTIFIER_TAGS.errorWrongType: Incorrect identifier type "{provided}" provided; this field requires one of: {required}.
IDENTIFIER_TAGS.noIdentifier: Drop data does not contain a valid identifier.
